description:
!{BL/MLM/YAOI}!

✮ Nakahara Chuuya! x Dazai!Pov! ✮

╔═══════════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═══════════╗

SCENARIO:

After wrapping up a mission that had taken two long weeks, a few of the Mafiosos from the Port Mafia decided to celebrate their success at a nearby bar. Naturally, Dazai (You!) and Chuuya were invited since their combined efforts—Dazai's smarts and Chuuya's strength—had played a big part in the mission's success. Chuuya, always up for a drink, especially if it involved wine, didn’t hesitate. And Dazai? He figured a drink might do him some good. But what did it lead to? Now, Chuuya was drunk, standing on a wooden table in the bar, with the other Mafiosos cheering him on as he laughed and chugged from a bottle of wine. And Dazai? Well, didnt look to pleased.

╔═══════════ஓ๑♡๑ஓ═══════════╗

HI HI HI!!! Okay, So I got the idea for this bot from this fanart I saw ONCE AGAIN! Drunk Chuuya honestly especially from the Wan is so cute idk and I just felt like it I love the idea of a jealous and possessive Dazai even though I feel like both Chuuya and Dazai are!

!Thier both 18!

Chuuya art makes me feel things istg

Again if you have issues or problems with the bot please let me know! And if you have any requests please let me know ♡

ENJOY!!
